name: SP8192 + Polar Express NS + MIN_LR + Tight GPTQ on PR #1790 stack
author: resouer
novelty: Cross-stack combination: ports four mechanisms from PR #1792 (Polar Express NS coefficients from #1344, VAL_LOSS_EVERY=0, MIN_LR=0.10, GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=1.5) onto PR #1790's stack (SP8192 + SmearGate + AttnOutGate(w24) + LoRA-TTT + Phased TTT). Polar Express NS replaces the single fixed (3.4445,-4.775,2.0315) Newton-Schulz tuple with 5 per-iteration minimax-optimal tuples in Muon's optimizer; MIN_LR=0.10 floors the warmdown LR; tight GPTQ_RESERVE=1.5s reclaims pre-quant budget while keeping enough cushion for stable serialization across nodes. No upstream PR has this combination on the #1790 stack.

credits.pr_1790_base_stack: miaoyuxun (SP8192 + SmearGate + AttnOutGate + LoRA-TTT + Phased TTT)
credits.pr_1344_polar_express_ns: orangekame3 et al. (5 per-iteration NS coefficients)
